---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a dataset, baseline, or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What would you like to see

A clear description of the feature or dataset you want supported.

## Why is it useful

Who benefits, and how it helps learners or researchers audit datasets.

## Scope check

- [ ] This stays within the project's scope (public dataset inspection and
      simple, reproducible baselines).
- [ ] This does not introduce medical, diagnostic, or assistive-reliability claims.

## Extra context

Links to the dataset (e.g. a MOABB dataset page), papers, or examples.
